result.stdout_text:
grep: Filter lines by pattern. Supports a common GNU grep subset.
Usage: grep [-i] [-v] [-c] [-n] [-F] [-E] [-o] [-w] [-x] [-q] <pattern> [path]

Examples:
  grep ERROR /logs/app.log
  cat /logs/app.log | grep -i timeout
  grep -F -o "timeout" /logs/app.log
  grep -c "payment failed" /logs/app.log
